name: Old-Fashioned Vegetable-Beef Stew
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut the meat into 1-inch cubes.
2. In a large skillet, brown the meat in hot oil, about half at a time. Drain well.
3. Place potatoes, carrots, onion, and celery in the crockpot.
4. Add frozen beans, tapioca, beef bouillon, Worcestershire sauce, thyme, salt, and pepper to the pot.
5. Stir in the undrained meat and diced tomatoes with water. Cover.
6. Cook on low-heat setting for 10-12 hours or on high-heat setting for 5-6 hours.
